Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const match=html.match\(/const CATS\\s*=\\s*\\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\];/\); if\(match\){const cats=eval\('['+match[1]+']'\); const jinyong = cats.find\(c=>c.id==='theme_273'\); console.log\('金庸武俠現有角色數:', jinyong.entries.length\); console.log\('現有角色:', jinyong.entries.map\(e=>e.name\).join\(', '\)\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const match=html.match\(/const CATS\\s*=\\s*\\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\];/\); if\(match\){const cats=eval\('['+match[1]+']'\); const jinyong = cats.find\(c=>c.id==='theme_273'\); console.log\('金庸武俠角色總數:', jinyong.entries.length\); console.log\('所有角色:', jinyong.entries.map\(e=>e.name\).join\('\\n'\)\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const match=html.match\(/const CATS\\s*=\\s*\\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\];/\); const cats=eval\('['+match[1]+']'\); const total=cats.reduce\(\(s,c\)=>s+\(c.entries?c.entries.length:0\),0\); console.log\('總角色卡數:',total\); const gothic=cats.find\(c=>c.name==='暗黑哥德'\); console.log\('暗黑哥德角色數:',gothic?gothic.entries.length:0\);")

Bash(awk '/^#### / {card=$0; has_id=0} /^- \\*\\*ID:\\*\\*/ {has_id=1} /^#### / && NR>1 && !has_id && prev_card {print prev_card} {prev_card=card} END {if\(!has_id && prev_card\) print prev_card}' "核心資料/風格範例.md")
Bash(awk '/^#### / {if\(NR>1 && !has_id\) count++; has_id=0} /^- \\*\\*ID:\\*\\*/ {has_id=1} END {if\(!has_id\) count++; print count}' "核心資料/風格範例.md")
